title: Navigating Uncertainties in RT-qPCR and Infectivity Assessment of Norovirus (scripts/output)
author: Montazeri, Naim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the datasets and statistical analysis files used to support the results presented in the associated published article: Mirmahdi, R.S., Dicker, S.L., Yusuf, N.G. et al. Navigating Uncertainties in RT-qPCR and Infectivity Assessment of Norovirus. Food Environ Virol 17, 22 (2025). [https://doi.org/10.1007/s12560-024-09632-0](https://doi.org/10.1007/s12560-024-09632-0).
